name.ja: ブラスデスの落とし穴

requirement.en: When your opponent Normal Summons a Level 8 or lower Effect Monster while you have a face-up Level 3 Fiend Type monster on your field or "Brassdes of the Diabolic Duds" in your Graveyard.

effect.en: Destroy that Normal Summoned monster. Then, you can make 1 face-up Level 3 monster on your field gain 700 ATK until the end of this turn.
